4 #include <arcane/ArcaneVersion.h>
5 #include "ArcGeoSim/Utils/Utils.h"
6 #include "ArcGeoSim/Utils/MemoryAllocationTracker.h"
7 
8 
9 #ifdef USE_ALIEN_V1
10 #include <ArcGeoSim/Numerics/AlienTools/Space.h>
11 
12 #include <ALIEN/Alien-IFPEN.h>
13 //#include <ALIEN/Alien-ExternalPackages.h>
14 
15 #ifdef USE_PETSC
16 #include <ALIEN/Kernels/PETSc/IO/AsciiDumper.h>
17 #include <ALIEN/Kernels/PETSc/Algebra/PETScLinearAlgebra.h>
18 #endif

20 #ifdef USE_MTL4
21 #include <ALIEN/Kernels/MTL/Algebra/MTLLinearAlgebra.h>
22 #endif
23 
24 #include "ArcGeoSim/Numerics/AlienTools/CreateDistribution.h"
25 #include "ArcGeoSim/Numerics/AlienTools/VectorAccessor.h"
26 #include "ArcGeoSim/Numerics/AlienTools/SimpleAbstractFamily.h"
27 #include "ArcGeoSim/Numerics/AlienTools/DirectBuilderStats.h"
28 #endif
29 
30 #ifdef USE_ALIEN_V2
31 #include <alien/ref/AlienRefSemantic.h>
32 #include <alien/kernels/simple_csr/algebra/SimpleCSRLinearAlgebra.h>
33 #ifdef USE_PETSC
34 #include <alien/kernels/petsc/io/AsciiDumper.h>
35 #include <alien/kernels/petsc/algebra/PETScLinearAlgebra.h>
36 #endif
37 
38 #ifdef ALIEN_USE_MTL4
39 #include <alien/kernels/mtl/algebra/MTLLinearAlgebra.h>
40 #endif
41 
42 #include <alien/arcane_tools/accessors/ItemVectorAccessor.h>
43 
44 #include <alien/arcane_tools/IIndexManager.h>
45 #include <alien/arcane_tools/indexManager/BasicIndexManager.h>
46 #include <alien/arcane_tools/data/Space.h>
47 #include <alien/arcane_tools/indexManager/SimpleAbstractFamily.h>
48 #include <alien/arcane_tools/distribution/DistributionFabric.h>
49 #endif
50 
51 
52 
53 #include <arcane/Timer.h>
54 #include <arcane/ItemPairGroup.h>
55 #include <arcane/mesh/ItemFamily.h>
56 #include <arcane/utils/PlatformUtils.h>
57 #include <arcane/utils/IMemoryInfo.h>
58 #include <arcane/utils/OStringStream.h>
59 
60 #include <boost/shared_ptr.hpp>
61 
62 #include "AlienTesterService.h"
63 
64 using namespace Arcane;
65 
66 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
67 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
68 
69 void AlienTesterService::init() {
70 
71 #ifdef USE_ALIEN_V1
72  Alien::setTraceMng(traceMng());
73  Alien::setVerbosityLevel(Alien::Verbosity::Debug);
74 #endif
75 #ifdef USE_ALIEN_V2
76  Alien::setTraceMng(traceMng());
77  Alien::setVerbosityLevel(Alien::Verbosity::Debug);
78 #endif
79 
80  m_diag_coeff = options()->diagonalCoefficient();
81  switch (options()->stencilBy()) {
82  case AlienTestOptionTypes::StencilByNode:
83  m_stencil_kind = IK_Node;
84  break;
85  case AlienTestOptionTypes::StencilByFace:
86  m_stencil_kind = IK_Face;
87  break;
88  }
89 
90  m_parallel_mng = subDomain()->parallelMng();
91 
92  if (m_parallel_mng->commRank() % 2 == 0)
93  m_n_extra_indices = options()->extraEquationCount();
94  else
95  m_n_extra_indices = 0;
96 
97  for(int i=0;i<options()->linearSolver.size();++i)
98  {
99  auto* solver = options()->linearSolver[i];
100  solver->init() ;
101  }
102 }
103 
104 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
105 
106 int AlienTesterService::test() {
107  Timer timer(subDomain(),"AlienTesterService",Timer::TimerVirtual);
108  m_w.resize(2);
109 
110  if (options()->checkMemory())
111  {
112  m_memory_tracker = new MemoryAllocationTracker();
113  m_memory_tracker->beginCollect();
114  }
115 
116  using namespace ArcGeoSim::Numerics;
117 
118  ItemGroup areaU = allCells();
119  // ItemGroup areaU = mesh()->cellFamily()->createGroup("AreaU");
120  ItemGroup areaP = allNodes();
121  // ItemGroup areaP = mesh()->nodeFamily()->createGroup("AreaP");
122  CellCellGroup cell_cell_connection(areaU.own(),areaU,m_stencil_kind);
123 
124  BuildingStat index_manager_stat(this, timer);
125  index_manager_stat.start();
126 #if defined(USE_ALIEN_V2)
127  Alien::ArcaneTools::BasicIndexManager index_manager(m_parallel_mng);
128 #else
129  Alien::BasicIndexManager index_manager(m_parallel_mng);
130 #endif
131  index_manager.setTraceMng(traceMng());
132 
133  // index_manager->init() ; // facultatif apr�s une construction; principalement utilis� pour une r�utilisation de l'objet
134 
135  // Area doit r�pondre est une collection �num�rable o� chaque �l�ment doit r�pondre � 'localId', 'uniqueId' et 'owner'
136  // 'localId' est pour l'acc�s au table 'cache' d'indexation et 'uniqueId' et 'owner' pour les algorthmiques d'indexation � proprement dit.
137  // L'indexation s'occupe d'indexer des entit�s (le plus souvent des items) ind�pendamment des concepts de syst�me lin�aire.
138  // Ainsi l'indexation est un objet qui forme une bijection entre des entit�s et un intervalle [O:N[ (par bloc en parall�le)
139  auto indexSetU = index_manager.buildScalarIndexSet("U", areaU);
140  // la variable U est taguee en "Elliptic" pour un traitement de type CprAMG:
141  // NOTE: le tag "block-tag" et la valeur "Elliptic" sont pre-definis specifiquement pour le cas CprAMG de IFPSolver
142  indexSetU.addTag("block-tag","Elliptic");
143 
144  // Idem en vectoriel
145  auto indexSetP = index_manager.buildVectorIndexSet("P", areaP, 1);
146  // Si l'on veut mettre des tags, on peut les mettre par composante ou pour tout l'entit� vectorielle
147  indexSetP[0].addTag("block-tag","P");
148  // indexSetP[1].addTag("block-tag","Q");
149 
150  Int64SharedArray xUids; // ajout de quelques indices extras pour les processeurs de rank pair
151  const Integer max_n_extra_indices = m_parallel_mng->reduce(Arcane::Parallel::ReduceMax, m_n_extra_indices);
152  for(Integer i=0;i<m_n_extra_indices;++i)
153  xUids.add(m_parallel_mng->commRank()*max_n_extra_indices + i);
154 
155 #if defined(USE_ALIEN_V2)
156  auto indexSetX = index_manager.buildScalarIndexSet("X", Alien::ArcaneTools::SimpleAbstractFamily(xUids, &index_manager));
157 #else
158  auto indexSetX = index_manager.buildScalarIndexSet("X", Alien::SimpleAbstractFamily(xUids, &index_manager));
159 #endif
160  indexSetX.addTag("block-tag","P");
161 
162  // index_manager->prepare(); // associ� � un espce, l'appel sera facultatif car pris en charge dans l'espace
163 
165  //
166  // CREATE Space FROM IndexManger
167  // CREATE MATRIX ASSOCIATED TO Space
168  // CREATE VECTORS ASSOCIATED TO Space
169  //
170 #ifdef USE_ALIEN_V1
171  Alien::ArcGeoSim::Space space(&index_manager);
172  Alien::MatrixDistribution mdist = Alien::ArcGeoSim::createMatrixDistribution(space);
173  Alien::VectorDistribution vdist = Alien::ArcGeoSim::createVectorDistribution(space);
174  Alien::Vector vectorB(vdist);
175  Alien::Vector vectorX(vdist);
176 #endif
177 
178 #ifdef USE_ALIEN_V2
179  index_manager.prepare() ;
180  info() << "Create Space";
181  auto space = Alien::ArcaneTools::Space(&index_manager);
182  auto mdist = Alien::ArcaneTools::createMatrixDistribution(space);
183  auto vdist = Alien::ArcaneTools::createVectorDistribution(space);
184 
185  auto vectorB = Alien::Vector(vdist);
186  auto vectorX = Alien::Vector(vdist);
187 #endif
188  // Acc�s � l'indexation
189  IntegerSharedArray allUIndex = index_manager.getIndexes(indexSetU);
190  IntegerSharedArray2 allPIndex = index_manager.getIndexes(indexSetP);
191  IntegerSharedArray allXIndex = index_manager.getIndexes(indexSetX);
192 
193  index_manager_stat.stop();
194 
196  //
197  // VECTOR BUILDING AND FILLING
198  //
199  info() << "Building & initializing vector b";
200 #if defined(USE_ALIEN_V1) || defined(USE_ALIEN_V2)
201  info() << "Space size = " << vdist.globalSize() << ", local size= " << vdist.localSize();
202 #endif
203  buildAndFillInVector(vectorB, 2.);
204 
205  // Testing linear algebra on vectors
206  {
207 
208 #if (defined(USE_ALIEN_V1) || defined(USE_ALIEN_V2)) && defined(ALIEN_USE_PETSC)
209  Alien::PETScLinearAlgebra algebra2;
210  algebra2.copy(vectorB,vectorX); // copy b in x using petsc
211 
212  info() << "Checking vector x data";
213  checkVectorValues(vectorX, 2.);
214 #endif
215  }
216 
217 
218  // Dump an object
219  // {
220  // Alien::AsciiDumper dumper(Alien::AsciiDumper::eMatlabStyle);
221 
222  // dumper.dump("vectorX.txt", vectorX);
223  // }
224 
226  //
227  // SCALAR PRODUCT
228  //
229  info() << "Checking dot product using different linear algebra implementations";
230  checkDotProductWithManyAlgebra(vectorB,vectorX,space);
231 
233  //
234  // VECTOR / VARIABLE ASSOCIATION
235  //
236  vectorVariableUpdate(vectorB,indexSetU);
237  info() << "Checking vector b data after a reverse commit";
238  checkVectorValues(vectorB, 2.);
239 
240  Arcane::XmlNode rootXmlBuilderNode = options()->builder.rootElement();
241  Arcane::XmlNodeList builderNodeList = rootXmlBuilderNode.children("builder");
242  for(Integer ibuilder=0;ibuilder<options()->builder.size();++ibuilder)
243  {
244 #if defined(USE_ALIEN_V1) || defined(USE_ALIEN_V2)
245  Alien::Matrix matrixA(mdist);
246 #endif
247  info() << "BUILDER #" << ibuilder << " : " << builderNodeList[ibuilder].value();
248 
249  BuildingStat profile_stat(this,timer);
250  SharedArray<BuildingStat> inserter_stats;
251 
253  //
254  // MATRIX BUILDING AND FILLING
255  //
256  {
257  AlienTestOptionTypes::eBuilderType builder_type = options()->builder[ibuilder];
258  switch(builder_type) {
259  case AlienTestOptionTypes::DirectBuilder: {
260 
261  for(Integer loop = 0; loop<options()->repeatLoop();++loop)
262  {
263  info() << "Filling #" << loop;
264 #if defined(USE_ALIEN_V1) || defined(USE_ALIEN_V2)
265  Alien::DirectMatrixBuilder builder(matrixA, Alien::DirectMatrixBuilder::ResetFlag::eResetValues);
266 #endif
267  if (loop == 0)
268  {
269  profile_stat.start();
270  builder.reserve(indexSetU.getOwnIndexes(),30);
271  builder.reserve(indexSetP[0].getOwnIndexes(),1);
272  builder.reserve(indexSetX.getOwnIndexes(),1);
273  builder.allocate(); // on force le placement de allocate ici pour les mesures de perfs (normalement seul l'autre suffit)
274  profile_stat.stop();
275  }
276  inserter_stats.add(BuildingStat(this,timer));
277  if (loop != 0) builder.allocate();
278  inserter_stats.back().start();
279  fillInMatrix(cell_cell_connection,areaP, allPIndex, allUIndex, allXIndex, builder);
280 #if defined(USE_ALIEN_V1)
281  info() << Alien::stats(builder, &index_manager);
282  builder.finalize(); // process extra work after filling (squeeze, non-local...)
283 #else
284  info() << builder.stats();
285  builder.finalize(); // process extra work after filling (squeeze, non-local...)
286 #endif
287  // optional if used with out-of-scope dtor
288  inserter_stats.back().stop();
289  }
290  } break;
291 
292  case AlienTestOptionTypes::ProfiledBuilder: {
293  profile_stat.start();
294  {
295 #if defined(USE_ALIEN_V1) || defined(USE_ALIEN_V2)
296  Alien::MatrixProfiler profiler(matrixA);
297 #endif
298  profileMatrix(cell_cell_connection,areaP, allPIndex, allUIndex, allXIndex, profiler);
299  profiler.allocate(); // optional if used with out-of-scope dtor
300  }
301  profile_stat.stop();
302 
303  for(Integer loop = 0; loop<options()->repeatLoop();++loop)
304  {
305  info() << "Filling #" << loop;
306  inserter_stats.add(BuildingStat(this,timer));
307  inserter_stats.back().start();
308 #if defined(USE_ALIEN_V1) || defined(USE_ALIEN_V2)
309  Alien::ProfiledMatrixBuilder builder(matrixA, Alien::ProfiledMatrixBuilder::ResetFlag::eResetValues);
310 #endif
311  fillInMatrix(cell_cell_connection, areaP, allPIndex, allUIndex, allXIndex, builder);
312  builder.finalize(); // process extra work after filling (squeeze, non-local...)
313  // optional if used with out-of-scope dtor
314  inserter_stats.back().stop();
315  }
316  } break;
317 
318  case AlienTestOptionTypes::StreamBuilder: {
319  profile_stat.start();
320 #if defined(USE_ALIEN_V1) || defined(USE_ALIEN_V2)
321  Alien::StreamMatrixBuilder stream_builder(matrixA);
322 #endif
323  stream_builder.setOrderRowColsOpt(false) ;
324 #ifdef USE_ALIEN_V2
325  stream_builder.setTraceMng(traceMng()) ;
326 #endif
327  // stream_builder.init() ; // optional : already done by ctor (only used by multiple usage of MatrixBuilder)
328  // stream_builder.start() ;
329  streamProfileMatrix(cell_cell_connection, areaU, areaP, allPIndex, allUIndex, allXIndex, stream_builder);
330 
331  profile_stat.stop();
332 
333  for(Integer loop = 0; loop<options()->repeatLoop();++loop)
334  {
335  info() << "Filling #" << loop;
336  stream_builder.fillZero();
337 
338  inserter_stats.add(BuildingStat(this,timer));
339  inserter_stats.back().start();
340 
341  streamFillInMatrix(cell_cell_connection, areaP, allPIndex, allUIndex, allXIndex, stream_builder);
342  stream_builder.finalize(); // process extra work after filling (squeeze, non-local...)
343  // NOT optional ! (since this object is usually used in a loop)
344  inserter_stats.back().stop();
345  }
346 
347  // stream_builder.end(); // optional : already done by dtor
348  } break;
349  default :
350  fatal()<<"Builder type : "<<builder_type<<" Not yet available";
351  }
352  }
354  //
355  // RESOLUTION
356  //
357  Arcane::XmlNode rootXmlNode = options()->linearSolver.rootElement();
358  Arcane::XmlNodeList linearSolverNodeList = rootXmlNode.children("linear-solver");
359 
360  SharedArray<SharedArray<Real> > solverData;
361 
362  if (!options()->buildingOnly())
363  for(int i=0;i<options()->linearSolver.size();++i)
364  {
365  solverData.add(SharedArray<Real>());
366  Array<Real> & currentSolverData = solverData[solverData.size()-1];
367  Real memory_before_solve = getAllocatedMemory();
368  resetMaxMemory();
369 
370  //info()<<"****** SOLVER #" << i << " : " << linearSolverNodeList[i].attrValue("name");
371  info()<<"****** SOLVER #" << i << " : ";
372  auto* solver = options()->linearSolver[i];
373 
374  if (not solver->hasParallelSupport() and m_parallel_mng->commSize() > 1)
375  {
376  info() << "Current solver has not a parallel support for solving linear system : skip it";
377  currentSolverData.add(std::numeric_limits<Real>::quiet_NaN( ));
378  currentSolverData.add(std::numeric_limits<Real>::quiet_NaN( ));
379  currentSolverData.add(std::numeric_limits<Real>::quiet_NaN( ));
380  currentSolverData.add(false);
381  currentSolverData.add(0);
382  currentSolverData.add(std::numeric_limits<Real>::quiet_NaN( ));
383  }
384  else
385  {
386  {
387 // // Dump an object
388 // {
389 // Alien::AsciiDumper dumper(Alien::AsciiDumper::eMatlabStyle);
390 //
391 // dumper.dump("vectorB.txt", vectorB);
392 // dumper.dump("matrixA.txt", matrixA);
393 // }
394 
395  Timer::Sentry ts(&timer);
396  solve(solver, matrixA, vectorB, vectorX);
397 
398 // {
399 // Alien::AsciiDumper dumper(Alien::AsciiDumper::eMatlabStyle);
400 //
401 // dumper.dump("vectorX.txt", vectorX);
402 // }
403 
404  //fatal() << "OK";
405  }
406  auto status = solver->getStatus();
407  currentSolverData.add(timer.lastActivationTime());
408  currentSolverData.add(getAllocatedMemory() - memory_before_solve);
409  currentSolverData.add(getMaxMemory() - memory_before_solve);
410  currentSolverData.add(status.succeeded);
411  currentSolverData.add(status.iteration_count);
412  currentSolverData.add(status.residual);
413  solver->end() ;
414  }
415  }
416 
417  if (subDomain()->parallelMng()->commRank() == 0)
418  {
419  info() << "========= Alien Statistics Summary with " << builderNodeList[ibuilder].value() << " =============";
420  printf("\tIndexManager time=%5.2f mem=%7.2f max_mem=%7.2f\n", index_manager_stat.time, index_manager_stat.memory, index_manager_stat.memory_max);
421  printf("\tProfiler time=%5.2f mem=%7.2f max_mem=%7.2f count=%d\n", profile_stat.time, profile_stat.memory, profile_stat.memory_max, profile_stat.allocation_count);
422  for(Integer i=0;i<inserter_stats.size();++i)
423  printf("\tFilling %2d time=%5.2f mem=%7.2f max_mem=%7.2f count=%d\n", i, inserter_stats[i].time, inserter_stats[i].memory, inserter_stats[i].memory_max, inserter_stats[i].allocation_count);
424 
425  if (!options()->buildingOnly())
426  {
427  printf("\tSolver %2s : %6s %7s %7s %7s %6s %8s\n",
428  "id","time","dmem","mmem","success","#iter","residual");
429 
430  Integer iglobal = 0;
431  // printf("Builder %s\n",options()->builder.enumValues()->nameOfValue(options()->builder[ibuilder],"").localstr());
432 
433  for(Integer isolver=0;isolver<options()->linearSolver.size();++isolver,++iglobal)
434  {
435  const Array<Real> & c = solverData[iglobal];
436 
437  printf("\tSolver %2d : %6.2f %7.2f %7.2f %7.0f %6.0f %8.3g",
438  isolver,c[0],c[1],c[2],c[3],c[4],c[5]);
439  printf("\n");
440  }
441  }
442  }
443  }
444 
445  delete m_memory_tracker, m_memory_tracker = NULL;
446 
447  return 1 ;
448 }
449 
450 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
451 
452 void
453 AlienTesterService::buildAndFillInVector(Alien::Vector& vectorB, const double& value)
454 {
455 #if defined(USE_ALIEN_V1) || defined(USE_ALIEN_V2)
456  {
457  Alien::LocalVectorWriter v(vectorB);
458  info() << "Vector local size= " << vectorB.distribution().localSize();
459  for(Integer i=0;i<vectorB.distribution().localSize();++i)
460  v[i] = value;
461  }
462 #endif
463 }
464 
465 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
466 
467 template<typename Profiler>
468 void
469 AlienTesterService::
470 profileMatrix(const CellCellGroup& cell_cell_connection,
471  const ItemGroup areaP,
472  const IntegerArray2& allPIndex,
473  const IntegerArray& allUIndex,
474  const IntegerArray& allXIndex,
475  Profiler & profiler)
476 {
478  //
479  // DEFINE PROFILE
480  //
481  ENUMERATE_ITEMPAIR(Cell,Cell,icell,cell_cell_connection)
482  {
483  const Cell & cell = *icell;
484  const Integer iIndex = allUIndex[cell.localId()];
485  profiler.addMatrixEntry(iIndex, allUIndex[cell.localId()]);
486  ENUMERATE_SUB_ITEM(Cell,isubcell,icell)
487  {
488  const Cell& subcell = *isubcell;
489  profiler.addMatrixEntry(iIndex,allUIndex[subcell.localId()]);
490  }
491  }
492 
493  ENUMERATE_NODE(inode, areaP.own())
494  {
495  const Node & node = *inode;
496  ConstArrayView<Integer> indexes = allPIndex[node.localId()];
497  for(Integer i=0;i<indexes.size();++i)
498  {
499  profiler.addMatrixEntry(indexes[i], indexes[i]);
500  }
501  }
502 
503  for(Integer localId=0;localId<m_n_extra_indices;++localId)
504  {
505  profiler.addMatrixEntry(allXIndex[localId],allXIndex[localId]);
506  }
507 }
508 
509 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
510 
511 void
512 AlienTesterService::
513 streamProfileMatrix(const CellCellGroup& cell_cell_connection,
514  const ItemGroup areaU,
515  const ItemGroup areaP,
516  const IntegerArray2& allPIndex,
517  const IntegerArray& allUIndex,
518  const IntegerArray& allXIndex,
519  Alien::StreamMatrixBuilder & inserters)
520 {
521  Alien::StreamMatrixBuilder::Profiler & uInserter = inserters.getNewInserter(); // id 0
522  ARCANE_ASSERT((uInserter.getId() == 0),("Bad ID"));
523  Alien::StreamMatrixBuilder::Profiler & pInserter = inserters.getNewInserter(); // id 1
524  ARCANE_ASSERT((pInserter.getId() == 1),("Bad ID"));
525  Alien::StreamMatrixBuilder::Profiler & xInserter = inserters.getNewInserter(); // id 2
526  ARCANE_ASSERT((xInserter.getId() == 2),("Bad ID"));
527  // uInserter.reserve(27*areaU.size()); // Pas plus rapide avec les r�serves ??
528  // pInserter.reserve(1*areaP.size());
529  // xInserter.reserve(m_n_extra_indices);
530 
531  ENUMERATE_ITEMPAIR(Cell,Cell,icell,cell_cell_connection)
532  {
533  const Cell & cell = *icell;
534  const Integer iIndex = allUIndex[cell.localId()];
535  uInserter.addMatrixEntry(iIndex, allUIndex[cell.localId()]);
536  ENUMERATE_SUB_ITEM(Cell,isubcell,icell)
537  {
538  const Cell& subcell = *isubcell;
539  uInserter.addMatrixEntry(iIndex,allUIndex[subcell.localId()]);
540  }
541  }
542 
543  ENUMERATE_NODE(inode, areaP.own())
544  {
545  const Node & node = *inode;
546  ConstArrayView<Integer> indexes = allPIndex[node.localId()];
547  for(Integer i=0;i<indexes.size();++i)
548  {
549  pInserter.addMatrixEntry(indexes[i], indexes[i]);
550  }
551  }
552 
553  for(Integer localId=0;localId<m_n_extra_indices;++localId)
554  {
555  xInserter.addMatrixEntry(allXIndex[localId],allXIndex[localId]);
556  }
557 
558  inserters.allocate(); // optional if used with out-of-scope dtor
559 }
560 
561 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
562 
563 void
564 AlienTesterService::
565 streamFillInMatrix(const CellCellGroup& cell_cell_connection,
566  const ItemGroup areaP,
567  const IntegerArray2& allPIndex,
568  const IntegerArray& allUIndex,
569  const IntegerArray& allXIndex,
570  Alien::StreamMatrixBuilder & inserters)
571 {
572  Alien::StreamMatrixBuilder::Filler & uInserter = inserters.getInserter(0);
573  uInserter.start();
574  Alien::StreamMatrixBuilder::Filler & pInserter = inserters.getInserter(1);
575  pInserter.start();
576  Alien::StreamMatrixBuilder::Filler & xInserter = inserters.getInserter(2);
577  xInserter.start();
578 
579  ENUMERATE_ITEMPAIR(Cell,Cell,icell,cell_cell_connection)
580  {
581  const Cell & cell = *icell;
582  uInserter.addData(fij(cell,cell));
583  ++uInserter;
584  ENUMERATE_SUB_ITEM(Cell,isubcell,icell)
585  {
586  const Cell& subcell = *isubcell;
587  uInserter.addData(fij(cell,subcell)) ;
588  ++uInserter;
589  }
590  }
591 
592  ENUMERATE_NODE(inode, areaP.own())
593  {
594  const Node & node = *inode;
595  ConstArrayView<Integer> indexes = allPIndex[node.localId()];
596  for(Integer i=0;i<indexes.size();++i)
597  {
598  pInserter.addData(2);
599  ++pInserter;
600  }
601  }
602 
603  for(Integer localId=0;localId<m_n_extra_indices;++localId)
604  {
605  xInserter.addData(5);
606  ++xInserter;
607  }
608 }
609 
610 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
611 
612 template<typename Builder>
613 void
614 AlienTesterService::
615 fillInMatrix(const CellCellGroup& cell_cell_connection,
616  const ItemGroup areaP,
617  const IntegerArray2& allPIndex,
618  const IntegerArray& allUIndex,
619  const IntegerArray& allXIndex,
620  Builder & builder)
621 {
623  //
624  // FILL MATRIX
625  //
626 #if 1 // use point filling
627  ENUMERATE_ITEMPAIR(Cell,Cell,icell,cell_cell_connection)
628  {
629  const Cell & cell = *icell;
630  const Integer iIndex = allUIndex[cell.localId()];
631  builder(iIndex,iIndex) += fij(cell,cell) ;
632  ENUMERATE_SUB_ITEM(Cell,isubcell,icell)
633  {
634  const Cell& subcell = *isubcell;
635  builder(iIndex,allUIndex[subcell.localId()]) += fij(cell,subcell) ;
636  }
637  }
638 #else /* use vector filling */
639  SharedArray<Integer> jIndexes;
640  SharedArray<Real> jValues;
641  ENUMERATE_ITEMPAIR(Cell,Cell,icell,cell_cell_connection)
642  {
643  const Cell & cell = *icell;
644  const Integer iIndex = allUIndex[cell.localId()];
645  jIndexes.resize(0);
646  jValues.resize(0);
647  jIndexes.add(iIndex); jValues.add(fij(cell,cell));
648  ENUMERATE_SUB_ITEM(Cell,isubcell,icell)
649  {
650  const Cell& subcell = *isubcell;
651  jIndexes.add(allUIndex[subcell.localId()]); jValues.add(fij(cell,subcell));
652  }
653  builder.addData(iIndex, 1, jIndexes, jValues);
654  }
655 #endif /* filling mode */
656  ENUMERATE_NODE(inode, areaP.own())
657  {
658  const Node & node = *inode;
659  ConstArrayView<Integer> indexes = allPIndex[node.localId()];
660  for(Integer i=0;i<indexes.size();++i)
661  {
662  builder(indexes[i], indexes[i]) += 2;
663  }
664  }
665 
666  for(Integer localId=0;localId<m_n_extra_indices;++localId)
667  {
668  builder(allXIndex[localId], allXIndex[localId]) += 5;
669  }
670 }
671 
672 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
673 
674 Alien::ILinearSolver::Status
675 AlienTesterService::solve(Alien::ILinearSolver * solver,
676  Alien::Matrix& matrixA,
677  Alien::Vector& vectorB,
678  Alien::Vector& vectorX)
679 {
680  { // R�initialisation de vectorX
681 #if defined(USE_ALIEN_V1) || defined(USE_ALIEN_V2)
682  Alien::LocalVectorWriter v(vectorX);
683 #endif
684  for(Integer i=0;i<v.size();++i) v[i] = 0;
685  }
686 
687  solver->solve(matrixA,vectorB,vectorX) ;
688 
689  auto status = solver->getStatus();
690  if (status.succeeded)
691  {
692  info() << "Solver succeeds with " << status.iteration_count << " iterations";
693 
695  //
696  // OPERATIONS ALGEBRIQUES
697  //
698 #if defined(USE_ALIEN_V1) || defined(USE_ALIEN_V2)
699  Alien::Space space(vectorB.distribution().globalSize());
700  std::shared_ptr<Alien::ILinearAlgebra> alg = solver->algebra();
701 #endif
702  if (alg)
703  {
704 #if defined(USE_ALIEN_V1) || defined(USE_ALIEN_V2)
705  Alien::Vector vectorY(vectorB.distribution());
706  Alien::Vector vectorRes(vectorB.distribution());
707 #endif
708  alg->mult(matrixA,vectorX,vectorY) ;
709 
710  // res = b - A.x
711  alg->copy(vectorB,vectorRes) ;
712  alg->axpy(-1.,vectorY,vectorRes) ;
713 
714  Real norm = alg->norm2(vectorRes) ;
715  info()<<"Residual norm2 by solver linear algebra : " << norm ;
716  }
717 
718  {
719 #if defined(USE_ALIEN_V1) || defined(USE_ALIEN_V2)
720  Alien::SimpleCSRLinearAlgebra testAlg;
721  Alien::Vector vectorY(vectorB.distribution());
722  Alien::Vector vectorRes(vectorB.distribution());
723 #endif
724  testAlg.mult(matrixA,vectorX,vectorY);
725  // res = b - A.x
726  testAlg.copy(vectorB,vectorRes) ;
727  testAlg.axpy(-1.,vectorY,vectorRes) ;
728  Real norm = testAlg.norm2(vectorRes) ;
729  info()<<"Residual norm2 by SimpleCSR algebra : " << norm ;
730  }
731 
732  {
733 #if (defined(USE_ALIEN_V1) || defined(USE_ALIEN_V2) ) && defined(ALIEN_USE_PETSC)
734  Alien::PETScLinearAlgebra testAlg;
735  Alien::Vector vectorY(vectorB.distribution());
736  Alien::Vector vectorRes(vectorB.distribution());
737  testAlg.mult(matrixA,vectorX,vectorY);
738  // res = b - A.x
739  testAlg.copy(vectorB,vectorRes) ;
740  testAlg.axpy(-1.,vectorY,vectorRes) ;
741  Real norm = testAlg.norm2(vectorRes) ;
742  info()<<"Residual norm2 by PETSc algebra : " << norm ;
743 #endif
744  }
745  }
746  else
747  {
748  fatal() << "Solver fails after " << status.iteration_count << " iterations";
749  }
750 
751  return status;
752 }
753 
754 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
755 
756 void
757 AlienTesterService::
758 checkVectorValues(Alien::Vector& vectorX, const double& value)
759 {
760 
761 #if defined(USE_ALIEN_V1) || defined(USE_ALIEN_V2)
762  const Alien::LocalVectorReader v(vectorX);
763 #endif
764  for(Integer i=0;i<v.size();++i)
765  if (v[i] != value)
766  fatal() << "Incorrect value (" << v[i] << " vs expected 2.)";
767  // auto-call for vB.end() in const context
768 }
769 
770 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
771 void
772 AlienTesterService::
773 #if defined(USE_ALIEN_V2)
774 vectorVariableUpdate(Alien::Vector & vectorB, Alien::ArcaneTools::IIndexManager::ScalarIndexSet indexSetU)
775 #else
776 vectorVariableUpdate(Alien::Vector & vectorB, Alien::IIndexManager::ScalarIndexSet indexSetU)
777 #endif
778 {
780  //
781  // VECTOR / VARIABLE
782  //
783 #if defined(USE_ALIEN_V2)
784  Alien::ArcaneTools::ItemVectorAccessor v(vectorB); // remplissage algébrique de vectorB : accessor / view
785  Alien::ArcaneTools::Variable(m_u) = v(indexSetU);
786  Alien::ArcaneTools::Variable(m_w)[1] = v(indexSetU);
787  Alien::ArcaneTools::Variable(m_u) += v(indexSetU);
788  v(indexSetU) = 0;
789  v(indexSetU) = Alien::ArcaneTools::Variable(m_u);
790  v(indexSetU) -= Alien::ArcaneTools::Variable(m_w)[1];
791 #else
792  Alien::ItemVectorAccessor v(vectorB); // remplissage algébrique de vectorB : accessor / view
793  Alien::Variable(m_u) = v(indexSetU);
794  Alien::Variable(m_w)[1] = v(indexSetU);
795  Alien::Variable(m_u) += v(indexSetU);
796  v(indexSetU) = 0;
797  v(indexSetU) = Alien::Variable(m_u);
798  v(indexSetU) -= Alien::Variable(m_w)[1];
799 #endif
800 }
801 
802 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
803 void
804 AlienTesterService::
805 checkDotProductWithManyAlgebra(const Alien::Vector& vectorB,
806  Alien::Vector& vectorX,
807 
808 #if defined(USE_ALIEN_V1) || defined(USE_ALIEN_V2)
809  Alien::ISpace& space)
810 #else
811  Alien::Space& space)
812 #endif
813 {
814  info() << "Checking dot product using two linear algebra implementations";
815 
816 #if defined(USE_ALIEN_V1) || defined(USE_ALIEN_V2)
817  Alien::SimpleCSRLinearAlgebra alg1;
818 #endif
819  alg1.copy(vectorB,vectorX); // copy b in x
820  const Real dot1 = alg1.dot(vectorB,vectorX);
821  info() << "SimpleCSR dot product : " << dot1;
822 
823 #if (defined(USE_ALIEN_V1) || defined(USE_ALIEN_V2) )&& defined(ALIEN_USE_PETSC)
824  Alien::PETScLinearAlgebra alg2;
825  alg2.copy(vectorB,vectorX); // copy b in x
826  const Real dot2 = alg2.dot(vectorB,vectorX);
827  info() << "PETSc dot product : " << dot2;
828  if (dot1 != dot2)
829  fatal() << "SimpleCSR vs PETSc : Not equal dot product";
830 #endif
831 #if (defined(USE_ALIEN_V1) || defined(USE_ALIEN_V2) ) && defined(ALIEN_USE_MTL4)
832  /*
833  if (m_parallel_mng->commSize() == 1) {
834  Alien::MTLLinearAlgebra alg3;
835  alg3.copy(vectorB,vectorX); // copy b in x
836  const Real dot3 = alg3.dot(vectorB,vectorX);
837  info() << "MTL dot product : " << dot3;
838  if (dot1 != dot3)
839  fatal() << "SimpleCSR vs MTL : Not equal dot product";
840  }*/
841 #endif
842 }
843 
844 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
845 
846 Real
847 AlienTesterService::
848 fij(const Cell & ci, const Cell & cj)
849 {
850  if (ci == cj)
851  return m_diag_coeff;
852  else
853  return -1;
854 }
855 
856 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
857 
858 Real
859 AlienTesterService::
860 getAllocatedMemory()
861 {
862 // // Utilise IMemoryInfo, si ca marche ....
863 // std::ostringstream oss;
864 // subDomain()->memoryInfo()->printAllocatedMemory(oss,globalIteration());
865 // long int current_allocated;
866 // if (sscanf(oss.str().c_str()," INFO_ALLOCATION: current= %ld ",&current_allocated) != 1)
867 // return -1;
868 // return Real(current_allocated)/1048576;
869 
870 
871  // Version a la mano
872  if (options()->checkMemory())
873  {
874  ARCANE_ASSERT((m_memory_tracker!=NULL),("Invalid null memory tracker"));
875  return Real(m_memory_tracker->getTotalAllocation())/1048576;
876  }
877  else
878  {
879  // Version tr�s approximative mais ne coutant rien
880  return platform::getMemoryUsed()/1048576;
881  }
882 }
883 
884 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
885 
886 Real
887 AlienTesterService::
888 getMaxMemory()
889 {
890  // Version a la mano
891  if (options()->checkMemory())
892  {
893  ARCANE_ASSERT((m_memory_tracker!=NULL),("Invalid null memory tracker"));
894  return Real(m_memory_tracker->getPeakAllocation())/1048576;
895  }
896  else
897  {
898  // Version tr�s approximative mais ne coutant rien
899  return std::numeric_limits<Real>::quiet_NaN( );
900  }
901 }
902 
903 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
904 
905 void
906 AlienTesterService::
907 resetMaxMemory()
908 {
909  if (m_memory_tracker)
910  m_memory_tracker->resetPeakAllocation();
911 }
912 
913 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
914 
915 Int64
916 AlienTesterService::
917 getAllocationCount()
918 {
919  if (m_memory_tracker)
920  return m_memory_tracker->getAllocationCount() + m_memory_tracker->getReallocationCount();
921  else
922  return -1;
923 }
924 
925 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
926 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
927 
928 ARCANE_REGISTER_SERVICE_ALIENTESTER(AlienTester,AlienTesterService);
